jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates:
Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates!
